sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23606" key="dedei=sai" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεδεῖσαι·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φοβῆσαι,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεδεῖσθαι·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὐλαβεῖσθαι, φοβεῖσθαι,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεδέχαται</orth>, <sense id="n23606.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δέχομαι.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
